# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

admin:
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: api_gateway_listener
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 80
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: api_gateway
                codec_type: AUTO
                access_log:
                  - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stream.v3.StdoutAccessLog
                      log_format:
                        json_format:
                          timestamp: "%START_TIME%"
                          method: "%REQ(:METHOD)%"
                          path: "%REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-PATH?:PATH)%"
                          protocol: "%PROTOCOL%"
                          response_code: "%RESPONSE_CODE%"
                          duration: "%DURATION%"
                          upstream_host: "%UPSTREAM_HOST%"
                          request_id: "%REQ(X-REQUEST-ID)%"
                use_remote_address: true
                generate_request_id: true
                request_timeout: 30s
                idle_timeout: 300s
                stream_idle_timeout: 60s
                request_headers_timeout: 10s
                common_http_protocol_options:
                  idle_timeout: 300s
                  headers_with_underscores_action: REJECT_REQUEST
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.health_check
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.health_check.v3.HealthCheck
                      pass_through_mode: false
                      headers:
                        - name: ":path"
                          string_match:
                            exact: "/healthz"
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.cors
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.cors.v3.Cors
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
                      suppress_envoy_headers: false
                route_config:
                  name: api_gateway_routes
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: api_services
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      cors:
                        allow_origin_string_match:
                          - safe_regex:
                              regex: ".*"
                        allow_methods: "GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS"
                        allow_headers: "Authorization, Content-Type, X-Request-ID, X-Trace-ID"
                        expose_headers: "X-Request-ID, X-Trace-ID"
                        max_age: "3600"
                      retry_policy:
                        retry_on: "connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes"
                        num_retries: 3
                        per_try_timeout: 10s
                        retry_back_off:
                          base_interval: 0.25s
                          max_interval: 1s
                        retriable_status_codes:
                          - 502
                          - 503
                          - 504
                      routes:
                        # User service routes
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/users"
                          route:
                            cluster: user_service
                            prefix_rewrite: "/users"
                            timeout: 15s
                            idle_timeout: 60s
                          request_headers_to_add:
                            - header:
                                key: "X-Forwarded-Service"
                                value: "user-service"
                              append_action: OVERWRITE_IF_EXISTS_OR_ADD

                        # Authentication service routes
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/auth"
                          route:
                            cluster: auth_service
                            prefix_rewrite: "/auth"
                            timeout: 10s
                            idle_timeout: 30s
                          request_headers_to_add:
                            - header:
                                key: "X-Forwarded-Service"
                                value: "auth-service"
                              append_action: OVERWRITE_IF_EXISTS_OR_ADD

                        # Order service routes
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/orders"
                          route:
                            cluster: order_service
                            prefix_rewrite: "/orders"
                            timeout: 20s
                            idle_timeout: 60s
                          request_headers_to_add:
                            - header:
                                key: "X-Forwarded-Service"
                                value: "order-service"
                              append_action: OVERWRITE_IF_EXISTS_OR_ADD

                        # Product service routes
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/products"
                          route:
                            cluster: product_service
                            prefix_rewrite: "/products"
                            timeout: 15s
                            idle_timeout: 60s
                          request_headers_to_add:
                            - header:
                                key: "X-Forwarded-Service"
                                value: "product-service"
                              append_action: OVERWRITE_IF_EXISTS_OR_ADD

                        # Notification service routes
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/notifications"
                          route:
                            cluster: notification_service
                            prefix_rewrite: "/notifications"
                            timeout: 10s
                            idle_timeout: 30s
                          request_headers_to_add:
                            - header:
                                key: "X-Forwarded-Service"
                                value: "notification-service"
                              append_action: OVERWRITE_IF_EXISTS_OR_ADD

                        # Search service with header-based routing
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/search"
                            headers:
                              - name: "X-Search-Version"
                                string_match:
                                  exact: "v2"
                          route:
                            cluster: search_service_v2
                            prefix_rewrite: "/search"
                            timeout: 30s

                        - match:
                            prefix: "/api/v1/search"
                          route:
                            cluster: search_service_v1
                            prefix_rewrite: "/search"
                            timeout: 30s

                        # Catch-all for unmatched routes
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          direct_response:
                            status: 404
                            body:
                              inline_string: '{"error": "Not Found", "message": "The requested API endpoint does not exist"}'
                          response_headers_to_add:
                            - header:
                                key: "Content-Type"
                                value: "application/json"

  clusters:
    # User Service Cluster
    - name: user_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      connect_timeout: 5s
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: user_service
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: user-service.backend.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
                  health_check_config:
                    port_value: 8080
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: user-service-2.backend.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
                  health_check_config:
                    port_value: 8080
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 3s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          no_traffic_interval: 30s
          http_health_check:
            path: "/health"
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 200
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 300s
            max_requests_per_connection: 1000
      connection_pool_per_downstream_connection: false
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 1024
            max_requests: 1024
            max_retries: 3
            track_remaining: true
          - priority: HIGH
            max_connections: 2048
            max_pending_requests: 2048
            max_requests: 2048
            max_retries: 5
      outlier_detection:
        consecutive_5xx: 5
        interval: 10s
        base_ejection_time: 30s
        max_ejection_percent: 50
        enforcing_consecutive_5xx: 100
        enforcing_success_rate: 100
        success_rate_minimum_hosts: 2
        success_rate_request_volume: 20
        success_rate_stdev_factor: 1900

    # Auth Service Cluster
    - name: auth_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      connect_timeout: 3s
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 16384
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: auth_service
        endpoints:

                      port_value: 8081

                  address:

                      address: auth-service-2.backend.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8081
      health_checks:

          interval: 5s
          unhealthy_threshold: 2
          healthy_threshold: 2
          no_traffic_interval: 15s
          http_health_check:
            path: "/health"
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 200
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http_protocol_options: {}
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 120s
            max_requests_per_connection: 500
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 512
            max_pending_requests: 512
            max_requests: 512
            max_retries: 2
            track_remaining: true
      outlier_detection:
        consecutive_5xx: 3
        interval: 5s
        base_ejection_time: 15s
        max_ejection_percent: 30
        enforcing_consecutive_5xx: 100

    # Order Service Cluster
    - name: order_service
      type: STRICT_DNS
      lb_policy: LEAST_REQUEST
      least_request_lb_config:
        choice_count: 3
      connect_timeout: 5s
      per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 65536
      dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: order_service

                  value: "envoy"

          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 300s
            max_requests_per_connection: 2000
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 2048
            max_pending_requests: 2048
            max_requests: 2048
            max_retries: 3
            track_remaining: true

        consecutive_5xx: 5

layered_runtime:
  layers:
    - name: static_layer
      static_layer:
        overload:
          global_downstream_max_connections: 50000
        envoy:
          resource_limits:
            listener:
              api_gateway_listener:
                connection_limit: 25000
